landing.ctaSubtitle: We would love to welcome you into our community

hero.headline: A tool built for His church
hero.subheadline: Helping pastors and leaders shepherd their flock with care — welcoming visitors, nurturing groups, and serving together as one body.

capabilities.title: What Ekklesia Offers
capabilities.subtitle: Ministry outcomes, not just features.
capabilities.card1Desc: QR-powered registration and follow-up pipeline so no guest is forgotten.
capabilities.card2Desc: Member profiles, attendance tracking, and at-risk alerts for proactive care.
capabilities.card3Desc: Small groups, gatherings, and prayer requests that keep the body connected.
capabilities.card4Desc: Event planning, volunteer scheduling, and service coordination in one place.
capabilities.card5Desc: Song library with presenter mode and a Bible reader with bookmarks.
capabilities.card6Desc: Announcements and notifications that reach your congregation — no scattered messages.

paths.title: Built for Everyone in the Church
paths.verse: "Where two or three gather in my name, there am I with them."
paths.leadersDesc: Register your church and get a complete management platform built for shepherding.
paths.leadersFeature3: Group health tracking and at-risk alerts
paths.leadersFeature4: Reports and analytics for wise stewardship
paths.membersDesc: Find your church, stay connected, and never miss what matters.
paths.membersFeature1: Join your church and connect with your group
paths.membersFeature2: View events, sign up to serve, and RSVP
paths.membersFeature3: Read the Bible and submit prayer requests
paths.membersFeature4: Receive announcements and stay in the loop

mission.title: Why Ekklesia Exists
mission.subtitle: "Whatever you do, do it all for the glory of God." — 1 Corinthians 10:31
mission.pillar1Desc: No fees, no tiers, no paywalls. Every feature is available to every church — always.
mission.pillar2Desc: Built from the ground up for Arabic-speaking churches, with full English support.
mission.pillar3Desc: Not for profit. Built to serve the Kingdom and equip the saints for ministry.

carry.title: Carry Together
carry.verse: "Bear one another's burdens, and so fulfill the law of Christ."
carry.intro: Ekklesia is 100% free for every church. But servers, databases, and development cost real money. We're not a company — we don't have investors or revenue. We built this for His glory, and we need the body of Christ to help carry it forward.
carry.tier1Desc: Pray for this ministry and the churches it serves.
carry.tier2Desc: Help cover hosting for your church and others.
carry.tier3Desc: Your support covers dozens of churches who can't afford tools like this.
carry.transparency: Every dollar goes to servers, databases, and keeping Ekklesia free. No salaries, no profit.

registration.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

step5.headline: Your church is ready!
step5.subheadline: Everything is set up and ready to go
